_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Velocity-CTD
author: hello@davlooo.it
description: Velocity-CTD is a fork of Velocity, a Minecraft server proxy with unparalleled server support, scalability, and flexibility.

installation.script:
#!/bin/ash
# Velocity-CTD Proxy Installation Script
# Server Files: /mnt/server

if [ -n "${DL_PATH}" ]; then
    echo -e "Using supplied download url: ${DL_PATH}"
    DOWNLOAD_URL=`eval echo $(echo ${DL_PATH} | sed -e 's/{{/${/g' -e 's/}}/}/g')`
else
    if [ -z "${VELOCITY_CTD_VERSION}" ] || [ "${VELOCITY_CTD_VERSION}" = "latest" ]; then
        API_URL="https://api.github.com/repos/GemstoneGG/Velocity-CTD/releases/latest"
    else
        API_URL="https://api.github.com/repos/GemstoneGG/Velocity-CTD/releases/tags/${VELOCITY_CTD_VERSION}"
    fi

    DOWNLOAD_URL=$(curl -sL "$API_URL" | jq -r '.assets[]?.browser_download_url' | grep -E 'all\.jar$' | head -n 1)

    if [ -z "$DOWNLOAD_URL" ] || [ "$DOWNLOAD_URL" = "null" ]; then
        echo -e "Failed to find a valid Velocity-CTD release jar."
        exit 1
    fi
fi

cd /mnt/server

echo -e "Running curl -L -o ${SERVER_JARFILE} ${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ -f "${SERVER_JARFILE}" ]; then
    mv "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${SERVER_JARFILE}.old"
fi

curl -L -o "${SERVER_JARFILE}" "${DOWNLOAD_URL}"

if [ -f velocity.toml ]; then
    echo -e "velocity config file exists"
else
    echo -e "downloading velocity-ctd config file"
    curl -L https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pterodactyl/game-eggs/main/minecraft/proxy/java/velocity-ctd/velocity.toml -o velocity.toml
fi

if [ ! -f forwarding.secret ]; then
    echo -e "creating forwarding secret file"
    touch forwarding.secret
    date +%s | sha256sum | base64 | head -c 12 > forwarding.secret
else
    echo -e "velocity forwarding secret file already exists"
fi

echo -e "install complete"

variables.name: Velocity-CTD Version
variables.description: The Velocity-CTD release tag to download. Set to 'latest' to download the latest stable release.

variables.name: Server Jar File
variables.description: Server Jarfile, by default this is set to 'velocity-ctd.jar'. Set it differently if you want another jar name.

variables.name: Download Path
variables.description: A URL to use to download a server jar rather than the release detected by the install script. This is not user viewable.
